package.name: sim_worlds
package.description:
Gazebo Classic (Gazebo 11) world files and SDF obstacle models.
Worlds: navigation_empty.world — flat 20×15 m room, good for first-run testing warehouse.world — 30×20 m warehouse with shelving rows indoor_office.world — 20×15 m office with partitions and desks
Obstacle models (in models/): obstacle_box — 0.60×0.40×1.00 m crate (blue) obstacle_cylinder — r=0.20 m, h=1.00 m post (orange) obstacle_wall — 2.00×0.10×0.80 m wall (grey) obstacle_pallet — 1.20×0.80×0.14 m pallet (brown)
To use: set GAZEBO_MODEL_PATH to share/sim_worlds/models (done by sim_bringup.launch.py). Runtime spawning is handled by sim_scenarios/scenario_manager_node.
